rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF PECHIN FU NG
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to January 12, 2015. Notice just sent to Mr. Booska's proper address on 12/15, for a hearing on 12/22, which is not proper notice. In addition, the court ordered notice to be given to Cecelia Ng, so direct notice is required. New notice must be sent to Mr. Booska and Ms. Ng for the new hearing date. Proof of service must be filed no later than January 7, 2015.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF WALTER J HARRINGTON
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to January 26, 2015 to allow time for service of summons on all persons entitled to notice of the petition for probate and for filing of proof of service of summons. no later than January 21, 2015, petitioner shall file a supplemental declaration confirming the foundation is the sole beneficiary of the trust. If not, all other beneficiaries must be identified and are entitled to notice.
